info.description:
### REST

Routes follow REST conventions (Richardson level 3).

**Auth:** Most `/api/v1/*` routes require `Authorization: Bearer <access_token>`.

**Widget:** `/api/v1/widget/*` routes accept a widget API key as Bearer token.

This is the Rust port of the Mako API — parity with NestJS at `/documentation`.
info.title: Mako API (Rust)
